title: Create Mechanical Chicken
body:
# Create Mechanical Chicken

Addon for create.
Generates milk with rotation and item ingredient.

## 1.21.1-2.x Version Requires Mechanicals Lib
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/mechanicals-lib "Modrinth")

## Features

- Mechanical Cow Kinectic block.
- Ponder
- Compat: JEI & JADE
- Configurable:
    - Processing time
    - Output amount
    - Output fluid
    - Stress impact
    - Fluid capacity
    - Required ingredient
    - Required ingredient amount
    - Sound volume

**Thanks to the Creators of Create.**
